---
title: "Introduction to baseballvizR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to baseballvizR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

The `baseballvizR` package provides convenience functions for some common tasks. I wanted to make this package because baseball statistics are just numbers on a page and don't always tell the full story. With the functions in this package you can get a glimpse behind just the raw data and start to see trends. 

To install this package from GitHub, use

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("remotes")
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("ADC-405-S26/baseballvizR")
```

Load the package using the following code.

```{r setup}
library(baseballvizR)
```

The package contains three functions

* `plot_zone_heatmap`

* `plot_spray_chart`
* `calculate_hitter_profile`
